The e-mail address of your MSpa app acco: The e-mail address of your MSpa app account
Password of your MSpa app account: Password of your MSpa app account
Select the MSpa cloud server for your re: Select the MSpa cloud server for your region
How often the device status is polled (m: How often the device status is polled (minimum 10s)
Automatically restore heating, filter an: Automatically restore heating, filter and other settings after restarting the whirlpool
Reset device temperature unit to Celsius: Reset device temperature unit to Celsius after restart
Correct temperature unit to Celsius at e: Correct temperature unit to Celsius at every poll (useful for devices that forget the setting)
Date when the UVC lamp was installed or: Date when the UVC lamp was installed or last replaced
Please enter a valid date in the format: Please enter a valid date in the format DD.MM.YYYY
Rated operating hours of the UVC lamp (d: Rated operating hours of the UVC lamp (default 8000 h)
Activate the adapter only within the def: Activate the adapter only within the defined season (DD.MM – DD.MM)
First day of the season, e.g. 01.05: First day of the season, e.g. 01.05
Please enter a valid date in the format: Please enter a valid date in the format DD.MM
Last day of the season, e.g. 30.09: Last day of the season, e.g. 30.09
Datapoint containing current PV generati: Datapoint containing current PV generation in Watts
Datapoint containing current house consu: Datapoint containing current house consumption in Watts
Minimum surplus (PV generation minus hou: Minimum surplus (PV generation minus house consumption) to activate the whirlpool
Surplus must drop below threshold minus: Surplus must drop below threshold minus hysteresis before the whirlpool is switched off again
Hysteresis must be less than the surplus: Hysteresis must be less than the surplus threshold
Wait this many minutes below threshold b: Wait this many minutes below threshold before starting the staged shutdown – prevents rapid on/off cycling when clouds pass
After heater OFF, wait this long before: After heater OFF, wait this long before UVC OFF; then wait again before filter OFF. Allows the heater to cool down with circulating water.
During staged shutdown, UVC is kept runn: During staged shutdown, UVC is kept running until this daily minimum is reached (filter stays on too). Set to 0 to always allow immediate UVC off.
Calculate daily kWh consumption via an e: Calculate daily kWh consumption via an external energy meter (e.g. smart plug)
Object ID external kWh meter (total kWh): Object ID external kWh meter (total kWh)
Datapoint of the external energy meter –: Datapoint of the external energy meter – must provide a continuously rising kWh total value
Note: An external kWh meter is required: Note: An external kWh meter is required (e.g. smart plug with energy monitoring). The daily counter resets automatically at midnight.
Define time windows in which the whirlpo: Define time windows in which the whirlpool is automatically activated. Outside these windows it will be switched off again. Enable the PV column to additionally activate a window when PV surplus is available (requires PV settings in the PV Surplus tab).
Example: John,Jane (leave empty to sen: Example: John,Jane   (leave empty to send to all users)
Notifications are sent on: PV surplus on: Notifications are sent on: PV surplus on/off · Time window start/end · Season start/end · UVC lamp expiry warning · Frost protection on/off · Manual override on/off
How many minutes the filter pump keeps r: How many minutes the filter pump keeps running after a time window ends (0 = off immediately)
Keep the pump running for this many minu: Keep the pump running for this many minutes after heating is turned off (helps to distribute heat evenly in the water)
Automatically activates heater + filter: Automatically activates heater + filter when water temperature drops below the frost threshold. Can also be toggled via control.winter_mode in VIS.
Heater + filter switch ON when water tem: Heater + filter switch ON when water temperature falls to or below this value, and OFF again when 3°C above it
From this time of day, the adapter ensur: From this time of day, the adapter ensures the UVC lamp has run for at least the daily minimum (uvc_daily_min_h). Filter is also started automatically if needed. Leave empty to disable.
Please enter a valid time in the format: Please enter a valid time in the format HH:MM
Auto manual-override duration after app: Auto manual-override duration after app change (minutes)
If the MSpa app changes heater, filter,: If the MSpa app changes heater, filter, UVC or target temperature while the adapter is active, manual override is automatically set for this many minutes. Set to 0 to disable auto-detection.
Language for Telegram and other notifica: Language for Telegram and other notification messages
